heading: Assistant Administrators of Environmental Protection Agency; appointment; duties
label: 4370a Assistant Administrators of Environmental Protection Agency; appointment; duties
notes: References in TextReorganization Plan Numbered 3 of 1970, referred to in subsec. (a)(1), is set out under .section 4321 of this title
CodificationSection was not enacted as part of the National Environmental Policy Act of 1969 which comprises this chapter.

children.text: the five Assistant Administrators provided for in section 1(d) of Reorganization Plan Numbered 3 of 1970 (5 U.S.C. Appendix);
the Assistant Administrator provided by ; andsection 2625(g) of title 15
the Assistant Administrator provided by .section 6911a of this title

children.label: b
children.text: Each Assistant Administrator appointed under subsection (a) shall perform such duties as the Administrator of the Environmental Protection Agency may prescribe.
